tasks.description: Deploy CTO-20260309-001: Fix orchestrator cascade bug in orchestrator.ts
tasks.context: Apply approved fix from CTO-20260309-001. In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, modify executeTask to handle agent execution failures gracefully without cascade. Wrap agent calls in try-catch, log errors, mark task as failed, continue processing remaining tasks. Prevents one failure from blocking entire sprint.

review.summary: Dual-rejected: Claude (25/100) + Codex (20/100). File is incomplete - cuts off mid-comment in executeTasks method. Missing critical functionality including executeAgentWithTimeout, processTaskResult, and isAgentPaused methods. Cannot assess full implementation. | The submitted source file is invalid due to markdown code fences and appears truncated/incomplete, breaking existing functionality.

issues.description: File is truncated - cuts off at line with incomplete comment '// This shou' in executeTasks method
Missing implementation of executeAgentWithTimeout method that is called in executeTask
Missing implementation of processTaskResult method that is called multiple times
Missing implementation of isAgentPaused method that is called in executeTask
No test file provided - violates requirement for Jest unit tests
Logger.getInstance() pattern suggests singleton - should use dependency injection
Source file begins with markdown code fencing (```typescript), which is invalid syntax in code files.
File appears truncated: executeTasks method is incomplete and missing closing braces, indicating loss of existing functionality.

tasks.description: Deploy CTO-20260309-002: Fix task status tracking in orchestrator.ts
tasks.context: Apply approved fix from CTO-20260309-002. In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, ensure task status updates persist to database after each state change. Add await on status update calls. Verify status transitions: pending->in_progress->completed/failed are atomic and logged.

tasks.description: Add orchestrator health check endpoint in router.ts
tasks.context: In backend/src/api/router.ts, add GET /orchestrator/health endpoint. Return: active sprint count, pending task count, last execution timestamp, error rate (failed/total tasks last 24h). Use existing prisma client to query sprint and task tables. Enable real-time monitoring of orchestrator health.

tasks.description: Create test sprint with 3 trivial tasks in orchestrator.ts
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add createTestSprint() function. Generate sprint with 3 simple tasks: (1) log message to console, (2) read health endpoint, (3) query database for sprint count. Each task targets different agent. Execute sprint and verify >66% approval rate. Log results to validate fixes.
